[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A stylized anime-style illustration shows a person with pink hair standing in the foreground while a glowing blue magical effect and a colorful landscape fill the background.

The main subject is a young-looking character with short pink hair, wearing a layered outfit with gold and dark accents and a shoulder piece, along with a belt-like strap across the torso. The character faces toward the right side of the image, with their head turned slightly as if looking at something off to the right. One arm is raised, holding or directing a glowing blue beam or magical arc that extends from near their hand toward the right side of the scene.

The setting appears to be an imaginative outdoor environment, suggested by a sky filled with swirling colors and silhouettes of landscape elements. In the background, there are tree-like or plant-like shapes and layered terrain in blue and yellow tones, with what look like birds or flying creatures outlined in the sky. Lighting is dramatic and saturated, dominated by blue and purple hues, with the strongest glow coming from the magical effect near the character’s hand.

No important visible text detected.

Practically, the image shows an anime-style character using a blue glowing magic attack against a fantastical, colorful background. It is framed as an action scene, with bright light effects emphasizing motion toward the right side of the image.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

[No readable text found in the screenshot.]

# Structured Version

- [No text detected]

# Notes

- The screenshot appears to be a game/anime-style image with no clearly readable UI text, captions, or labels.
- If you have a higher-resolution version or a screenshot that includes UI elements (menus, dialogue boxes, subtitles), upload it and I’ll extract the text.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
